query.description: (Required) Number of subtasks a page (1 to 20)
(Required) Task group ID (If not specified, the task will be duplicated to the current task group)
(Required) Data offset. When offset=0, you can get data from the first data row.
(Required) The amount of data rows(range from 1 to 1000).

description.content: Get Data From a Designated Batch by Offset

Octoparse is your no-coding solution for web scraping to turn pages into
structured data within clicks.
